title: draba × abiskoensis
intro: Draba × abiskoensis, also known as Abisko rockcress, is a rare, hybrid species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Draba × abiskoensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, prevent infection, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable remedy for various skin issues. Herbal preparations of Draba × abiskoensis can be found in the form of infusions, ointments, and salves, which can be used topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
